meaning: n.喷射,黑玉v.喷射adj.黑玉色的,墨黑的 喷气机
examples: He had arrived from Key West by jet.
I watched as they got on the jet ski.
The aircraft is powered by a jet engine.
His father owned radio and cable properties, with diversions into shipbuilding and jet charter.
Powered by six 747 jet engines, the plane will require a 12, 000ft runway for takeoffs and landings.
